name: Tim McCarthy
title: Director, Bank Relationships

family.son_ryan: Works in private equity, married, in his 30s

notes: Old friend from when user worked at Wellington. Director-level, interfaces at CEO level with banking counterparties. Role covers research relationships, market data, counterparty risk, due diligence on broker-dealers. Meeting 1 (2026-03-30): discussed baseball analytics tools, his son Ryan in PE, business model strategy (bespoke vs subscription), and potential collaboration.
